records.name: 测试流程
records.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:kiwi="http://kiwi.com/bpmn" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_1" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn">
  <bpmn:process id="p-4187f376-33a5-41d5-bf0e-a25cd1d41c4e" name="测试流程" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_0o2u43d</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_1u6pnwd" name="HTTP 请求" camunda:delegateExpression="${httpRequest}" kiwi:componentId="classpath_httpRequest">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="classpath_httpRequest" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="url">https://timeapi.io/api/Time/current/zone?timeZone=Asia/Shanghai</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="method">GET</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">{}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="connectTimeoutSeconds">10</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="readTimeoutSeconds">30</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_0o2u43d</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_1qps5g0</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_0o2u43d" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Activity_1u6pnwd" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Activity_1to7911" name="JSON 映射" camunda:delegateExpression="${jsonMapActivity}" kiwi:componentId="classpath_jsonMapActivity">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:properties>
          <camunda:property name="componentId" value="classpath_jsonMapActivity" />
        </camunda:properties>
        <camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="source">${responseBody}</camunda:inputParameter>
          <camunda:inputParameter name="mappings">[{"key":"shanghaiTime","value":"dateTime"}]</camunda:inputParameter>
        </camunda:inputOutput>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_1qps5g0</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_1qps5g0" sourceRef="Activity_1u6pnwd" targetRef="Activity_1to7911" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="p-4187f376-33a5-41d5-bf0e-a25cd1d41c4e">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="_BPMNShape_StartEvent_2" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="173" y="102" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_1u6pnwd_di" bpmnElement="Activity_1u6pnwd">
        <dc:Bounds x="260" y="80" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Activity_1to7911_di" bpmnElement="Activity_1to7911">
        <dc:Bounds x="480" y="90" width="100" height="80" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_0o2u43d_di" bpmnElement="Flow_0o2u43d">
        <di:waypoint x="209" y="120" />
        <di:waypoint x="260" y="120" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_1qps5g0_di" bpmnElement="Flow_1qps5g0">
        <di:waypoint x="360" y="130" />
        <di:waypoint x="480" y="130" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>
